name: Zen Rage
short_description: Digitally demolish any image—whether it's a screenshot of your current screen, one of the dozen included template images, or any image from your hard drive.
detailed_description:
Zen Rage: The Ultimate Digital Stress Ball

Ever wanted to chainsaw through your computer screen? Now you can—digitally! Zen Rage transforms any image into your personal destruction playground, turning stress into satisfying chaos.

Screenshot mode

Start the game in screenshot mode, and egg your favorite politician (or that ex, your boss, the algorithm). Egg 'em. Tomato 'em. Watch the mess. Then delete the evidence and go back to being a functional adult.

ZenRage: Rage responsibly... digitally.

Key Features

  • Instant Screenshot Destruction: Bind to a hotkey and demolish any screen instantly—perfect for reacting to frustrating moments!

  • 11 Unique Campaign Levels: Follow the scientist's guidance through an epic story mode with hilarious psychological assessment reports!

  • Massive Tool Arsenal: Wield chainsaws, hammers, machine guns, Tesla coils, digital ants, paint rollers, water hoses, and more!

Game Modes

  • Screenshot Mode: Quick stress relief from any screen with instant hotkey activation!

  • Story Mode: 11 levels of guided chaos from archaeological digs to boss battles!

  • Free Play: Sandbox mode with all tools unlocked for unlimited destruction!

  • Template Gallery: Pre-made images ready for immediate demolition!

Perfect For

  • Streamers: React to frustrating moments with instant screenshot destruction!

  • Stress Relief: Quick 5-minute sessions to blow off steam!

  • Creative Destruction: Upload custom images and unleash your artistic rage!

  • Fans of Satisfying Games: Experience the joy of pixelated mayhem!

Why wait? Turn your rage into zen through the power of digital destruction!

PSA: No ants were harmed in the making of this game.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Croatian, Serbian
